items.title_en: UAE's departure from the OPEC oil cartel is not without precedence. Who could be next?
items.title_zh: 阿联酋退出欧佩克石油卡特尔并非没有先例。下一个可能是谁？
items.desc_en: The United Arab Emirates' decision to leave OPEC is reverberating across global energy markets, sparking questions on who else could follow.

items.title_en: U.S. warns banks of sanctions risk over China ‘teapot’ refineries handling Iranian oil
items.title_zh: 美国警告银行，中国“茶壶”炼油厂处理伊朗石油存在制裁风险
items.desc_en: The alert said China purchases approximately 90% of Iran's oil exports, with teapot refineries accounting for the majority of these imports.
items.desc_zh: 该警报称，中国购买了伊朗约 90% 的石油出口，其中茶壶炼油厂占了大部分进口量。

items.desc_zh: 第一季度通胀数据低于路透社调查的经济学家预期的 4.2%。

items.title_en: Purdue Pharma receives $5.5 billion sentence, paving way for opioid settlement

items.desc_zh: 普渡制药公司 (Purdue Pharma) 周二被判处 55 亿美元的罚款和处罚，罪名是欺骗监管机构和向医生付费以促进阿片类药物销售。

items.title_en: Here's everything to expect when the Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday
items.title_zh: 美联储周三发布最新利率决定时，所有值得期待的事情都在这里
items.desc_en: In what could be Jerome Powell's final meeting as Fed chair, he and his fellow policymakers are likely to continue their cautious approach.
items.desc_zh: 这可能是杰罗姆·鲍威尔作为美联储主席的最后一次会议，他和他的政策制定者同行可能会继续采取谨慎的态度。

items.title_en: Starbucks raises full-year outlook after earnings, revenue top estimates
items.title_zh: 星巴克上调全年业绩预期，收入高于预期
items.desc_en: Starbucks' global same-store sales, which only includes cafes open at least a year, increased 6.2%, fueled by more visits to its locations.
items.desc_zh: 星巴克的全球同店销售额（仅包括开业至少一年的咖啡馆）增长了 6.2%，这主要得益于星巴克门店客流量的增加。

items.title_en: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
items.title_zh: 马斯克表示 OpenAI 诉讼中慈善捐赠的基础受到威胁
items.desc_en: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Workers train AI to identify everyday objects by labelling items in photos and videos.
items.desc_zh: 工作人员训练人工智能通过在照片和视频中标记物品来识别日常物品。

items.title_en: Ex-FBI Director James Comey indicted for his ‘8647’ seashell post on Instagram
items.title_zh: 前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米因在 Instagram 上发布“8647”贝壳帖子而被起诉
items.desc_en: Trump had accused Comey of "calling for the assassination of the president" by sharing the image of the numbers in the May 15 Instagram post.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普通过分享 5 月 15 日 Instagram 帖子中的数字图片，指责科米“呼吁暗杀总统”。

items.title_en: These bonds protect against inflation. How to optimize them for your portfolio
items.title_zh: 这些债券可以抵御通货膨胀。如何针对您的投资组合优化它们
items.desc_en: Treasury inflation-protected securities are back in the mix as investors grapple with worries over higher prices.
items.desc_zh: 随着投资者努力应对价格上涨的担忧，通胀保值国债又重新回归市场。

items.title_en: Former FBI director James Comey indicted for second time
items.title_zh: 前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米第二次被起诉
items.desc_en: The indictment stems from a 2025 photo of seashells posted by Comey that critics have said encouraged violence against the US president.
items.desc_zh: 该起诉书源于科米发布的一张 2025 年贝壳照片，批评者称这张照片鼓励了针对美国总统的暴力行为。

items.title_en: U.S. oil hovers near $100 on report Trump dissatisfied with Iran's proposal to open Hormuz
items.title_zh: 有报道称特朗普对伊朗开放霍尔木兹海峡的提议表示不满，美国油价徘徊在100美元附近
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose as investors parsed fresh signals from U.S.-Iran negotiations, with uncertainty over a potential de-escalation keeping markets on edge.
items.desc_zh: 随着投资者解析美伊谈判的新信号，油价上涨，潜在缓和局势的不确定性让市场紧张不安。

items.title_en: US regulator to review Disney broadcast licences after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
items.title_zh: 吉米·金梅尔拿梅拉尼娅·特朗普开玩笑后，美国监管机构将审查迪士尼的广播许可证
items.desc_en: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.desc_zh: 此举出台之际，白宫向迪士尼旗下的美国广播公司施压，要求解雇金梅尔，因为他称梅拉尼娅是“即将成为寡妇的人”。

items.title_en: Ex-TV showgirl's pardon at centre of widening Italian scandal
items.title_zh: 前电视女歌星的赦免是意大利丑闻不断扩大的中心
items.desc_en: Nicole Minetti was convicted of facilitating prostitution in connection with the notorious "bunga bunga" parties at Silvio Berlusconi's villa.
items.desc_zh: 妮可·米内蒂因参与西尔维奥·贝卢斯科尼别墅臭名昭著的“bunga bunga”派对而被定罪。

items.title_en: Path cleared for Everest climbers after huge ice block
items.title_zh: 巨大冰块后为珠穆朗玛峰登山者开辟了道路
items.desc_en: Experts warn there are still risks of further ice collapses, and there are fears climbers will again have to queue to reach the summit.
items.desc_zh: 专家警告说，冰层进一步崩塌的风险仍然存在，人们担心登山者将再次不得不排队才能登顶。

items.title_en: Indian billionaire's son offers to save Escobar's hippos
items.title_zh: 印度亿万富翁的儿子主动提出拯救埃斯科巴的河马
items.desc_en: Anant Ambani - son of Asia's richest man Mukesh Ambani - says he can take care of the animals roaming free since the drug lord's death.
items.desc_zh: 亚洲首富穆克什·安巴尼的儿子阿南特·安巴尼表示，他可以照顾毒枭死后自由活动的动物。

items.title_en: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙警告称，随着全球债务风险的加剧，未来将出现“某种债券危机”
items.desc_en: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.
items.desc_zh: 戴蒙是全球市值最大的银行摩根大通的负责人，他表示，当今日益增长的风险组合可能会以不可预测的方式结合起来。

items.title_en: Ex-actor Nathan Chasing Horse jailed for at least 37 years for sexual assault
items.title_zh: 前演员内森追马因性侵犯被判入狱至少 37 年
items.desc_en: The 49-year-old exploited his position as a spiritual leader to prey on Indigenous women and girls, the US court heard.
items.desc_zh: 美国法院获悉，这名 49 岁的男子利用其精神领袖的地位对土著妇女和女孩进行性侵。

items.title_zh: 乌克兰第三次袭击袭击俄罗斯炼油厂并促使疏散
items.desc_en: Residents near a burning refinery in Tuapse are told to leave, and the Kremlin accuses Kyiv of destabilising global energy markets.
items.desc_zh: 图阿普谢一座燃烧的炼油厂附近的居民被告知离开，克里姆林宫指责基辅破坏了全球能源市场的稳定。

items.title_zh: 最高法院将权衡特朗普终止海地和叙利亚驱逐盾的提议，数千人准备做出裁决 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: OpenAI trial live updates: Opening arguments in Musk v. Altman lawsuit set to begin
items.title_zh: OpenAI 审判实时更新：马斯克诉 Altman 诉讼的开庭辩论即将开始
items.desc_en: Elon Musk sued OpenAI, Sam Altman and Greg Brockman in 2024, claiming they reneged on their promise to keep the artificial intelligence lab a nonprofit.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 于 2024 年起诉 OpenAI、山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和格雷格·布罗克曼 (Greg Brockman)，声称他们违背了让人工智能实验室保持非营利性的承诺。

items.title_en: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec
items.title_zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国退出石油卡特尔欧佩克
items.desc_en: The UAE says it is leaving the Opec and Opec+ groups of major oil producing nations.
items.desc_zh: 阿联酋表示将退出主要石油生产国的欧佩克和欧佩克+组织。

items.title_en: Manhunt for suspected gunman aged 89 as five wounded in Athens
items.title_zh: 雅典追捕 89 岁枪手，造成 5 人受伤
items.desc_en: Five people were left with life-threatening injuries, according to Greece's state broadcaster ERT.
items.desc_zh: 据希腊国家广播公司 ERT 报道，有 5 人受伤，危及生命。

items.title_en: Ukraine accuses Israel of receiving shipments of grain 'stolen' by Russia
items.title_zh: 乌克兰指责以色列接收俄罗斯“偷走”的粮食
items.desc_en: Israel's foreign minister says it has received no evidence to support the claim that a vessel carrying grain from occupied Ukraine has reached Haifa.
items.desc_zh: 以色列外交部长表示，没有收到证据证明一艘从被占领的乌克兰运载谷物的船只已抵达海法。

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。

items.title_en: Valve's £85 Steam Controller divides gamers ahead of May launch
items.title_zh: Valve 售价 85 英镑的 Steam 控制器在 5 月发布前吸引了玩家
items.desc_en: The pad will be compatible with PCs, Valve's handheld console, the Steam Deck as well as its upcoming gaming PC.
items.desc_zh: 该垫将与 PC、Valve 的手持控制台、Steam Deck 以及即将推出的游戏 PC 兼容。

items.title_en: Austrian goes on trial accused of plotting attack on Taylor Swift concert
items.title_zh: 奥地利人因策划袭击泰勒·斯威夫特演唱会而受审
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say the man, 21-year-old Beran A, received training from members of jihadist group Islamic State on how to handle explosives.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，这名 21 岁的男子 Beran A 接受了圣战组织伊斯兰国成员如何处理爆炸物的培训。

items.title_en: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯超级游艇不顾封锁穿越霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.
items.desc_zh: 这艘 1.41 m 长的船只与俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京 (Vladimir Putin) 的亲密盟友有联系，尽管封锁仍在继续，但它还是清理了水道。

items.title_en: Suspect charged with attempted assassination of Trump at Washington dinner
items.title_zh: 嫌疑人被控在华盛顿晚宴上企图暗杀特朗普
items.desc_en: Investigators say the 31-year-old California man wanted to kill as many high-level officials as possible.
items.desc_zh: 调查人员称，这名 31 岁的加州男子想要杀死尽可能多的高级官员。

items.title_en: Why Spotify has no button to filter out AI music
items.title_zh: 为什么Spotify没有过滤AI音乐的按钮
items.desc_en: Music streamer Deezer allows users to filter out AI music, so why does Spotify not offer the same?
items.desc_zh: 音乐流媒体 Deezer 允许用户过滤 AI 音乐，那么为什么 Spotify 不提供同样的服务呢？

items.title_en: SonicMeet
items.title_zh: SonicMeet
items.desc_en: Live captions & translation for Google Meet, Zoom and Teams
items.desc_zh: Google Meet、Zoom 和 Teams 的实时字幕和翻译

items.title_en: Pharma bets a little-known form of cholesterol will underpin its next blockbuster heart drugs
items.title_zh: 制药公司押注一种鲜为人知的胆固醇将成为其下一款重磅心脏病药物的基础
items.desc_en: Novartis, Amgen and Eli Lilly are betting that slashing levels of a particularly bad form of cholesterol could deliver the next blockbusters in cardiology.
items.desc_zh: 诺华 (Novartis)、安进 (Amgen) 和礼来 (Eli Lilly) 押注，降低一种特别有害的胆固醇水平可能会带来心脏病学领域的下一个重磅炸弹。

items.title_en: At least four killed and dozens injured in Indonesia train crash
items.title_zh: 印尼火车相撞事故造成至少四人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Officials say a commuter train and a long-distance train collided on the outskirts of Jakarta on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，周一，一列通勤列车与一列长途列车在雅加达郊区相撞。

items.desc_zh: 从预测市场赚取有保证的钱

items.title_en: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
items.desc_en: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.
items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.title_en: I brought my husband back for his funeral as a hologram
items.title_zh: 我把我丈夫带回来参加他的葬礼作为全息图
items.desc_en: After nearly 60 years of marriage, Pam wanted to honour her husband Bill with a hologram at his funeral.
items.desc_zh: 结婚近 60 年后，帕姆想在丈夫比尔的葬礼上用全息图来纪念他。

items.title_zh: WUPHF by Nex.ai

items.desc_zh: 建立自己的知识库的AI员工

items.title_en: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.desc_en: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.desc_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉
items.desc_en: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.
items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。

items.title_en: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
items.title_zh: 英国网络负责人表示，是时候放弃密码而改用万能钥匙了——万能钥匙是什么？
items.desc_en: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，密码一直是我们保护在线帐户安全的默认方式，但 NCSC 表示，密钥是更好的选择。

items.title_en: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.title_zh: 老板称英国生物银行数据事件是由“一些坏苹果”引起的
items.desc_en: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.desc_zh: 教授罗里·柯林斯爵士表示，作为银行的老板和参与者，他对这一事件感到“愤怒”和“不安”。

items.desc_zh: 具有代理、RAG 和 MCP 的自托管 AI 工作流程自动化

items.title_en: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。
